# Q3 comp sum — total bytes out per host (data exfil volume)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Data-exfiltration by volume — rank egress by bytes moved per host/destination. Q3 comp sum — total bytes out per host.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows | comp sum(bytes_out) as total_out by host | sort desc total_out
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 8). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
